top_signals.title: Takaichi Says 100% of Japan’s Oil Supply to Avoid Hormuz in July
top_signals.summary: Japan’s crude oil imports in July are expected to be fully sourced from areas that don’t require transit through the Strait of Hormuz, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said Thursday, as she seeks to diversify the resource-poor nation’s energy supply ahead of the hot summer months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin advances, holds above key technical level that ether, solana can't break through
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
